fields.description:
## Context
Umbrella for the 2026-06-09 post-extraction audit, workstream 1: migration artifacts no longer relevant in standalone rebar — remaining dso references, orphaned/unreachable engine scripts, half-implemented features stranded by the extraction, stale docs. Previously-deferred Tier-D items (dso-named reconciler internals, dso_label Jira scheme, plugins.dso.* module keys) are IN SCOPE: rebar is not dso-compatible and prior dso functionality can be freely broken. Every orphan claim was verified by reachability grep before its child ticket was filed. Child tasks carry per-instance evidence and remediation.

## Success Criteria
- All child tickets closed (deletions with their locking tests removed in the same commit; full suite green each time).
- git grep -iE 'dso|brainstorm|preplanning|scrutiny' over src/ and docs/ returns only deliberate, documented residue (e.g. historical provenance ids if kept).
- The published wheel ships no orphaned engine files.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Zero unreachable files under src/rebar/_engine/ (reachability map re-run clean)
- [ ] No rebar runtime writes under .claude/ (child story petty-pixel-rat)
- [ ] Final residue grep documented with a written justification per remaining hit
